programme.title: The Intolerant Cooks
programme.sub-title: Yummy, Yummy, Yummy I Got Curry In My Tummy!
programme.desc: Join witty food intolerants as they create delicious recipes using fresh regional produce for those with food sensitivities.

programme.title: Extended Family
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Loaning Your Dad Money
programme.desc: Jim advises a player on the Celtics to take one of his recent losses less personally, sparking a controversy that forces the Kearney clan to confront their spiritual beliefs.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: Noah tries to find a new normal with Simone. Anthony realises he doesn't have a poker face. Sherm starts a risky new business. And there's wine.

programme.title: Lopez Vs. Lopez
programme.desc: When Elsa, George's mother, changes the locks on Mayan and Quinten's house, George enlists the help of his lawyer cousin, who reveals surprising information about Elsa. Mayan and Quinten receive news.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mark takes on odd jobs, determined to find a way to pay for school; Darlene grapples with her emotions when she discovers her household is about to change dramatically.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A sudden turn of events forces the Conners to face the daily struggles of life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: A Tiger's Visit To The Dentist
programme.desc: At the Mogo Zoo, Saraya the Sumatran tiger is in excruciating pain from a fractured tooth. Chris has done plenty of dental surgeries on cats before but fixing this huge fang is going to be a logistical nightmare. And what if the big cat wakes up during surgery?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: In the middle of the night, Chris is called out to a women's prison to help a mother in trouble. Golden retriever Brielle is giving birth to a huge litter of puppies that are earmarked to become assistance dogs. Assistance Dogs Australia run several prison programs where inmates raise and train their puppies. But this is the first-time inmates have been involved with a birth behind bars. It's going to be a long night and it looks like hard labour for Brielle!

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn. Owners Marcelo and Kata used to be married to each other but now fight over everything, and their bickering is driving customers away.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay steps in to save a small cafe and a couple's engagement.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Veteran house music groover Mark meets Alison - call centre worker by day, raver by night.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride suspects that Baitfish has returned, and the NCIS team set out to chase leads in an attempt to locate him.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: After a sailor is killed in a strip club, the murder weapon turns out to be linked to other unsolved cases, and Brody receives a visit from her ex-fiance.

programme.title: The Rising
programme.desc: Fearing her time is limited and with unfinished business, Neve sets out to make amends; her anger grows when her killer is released.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits failing restaurants across the USA in an attempt to revive their businesses. He and his team access the damage and help the owners get back into business.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn. Owners Marcelo and Kata used to be married to each other but now fight over everything, and their bickering is driving customers away.

programme.title: Jordie, Sam & Ted's Adventures
programme.desc: Sam, Jordie and Ted welcome one more to the team as they adventure through Queensland. This week they're exploring Rainbow beach.

programme.title: Jordie, Sam & Ted's Adventures
programme.desc: In this season finale Sam, Jordie and the boys head to Kgari to adventure through the worlds largest sand island.

programme.title: The Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: Carrie squares off against her ruthless former mentor; Nolan wrestles with an unwelcome change; Tasha lands face-to-face with evil itself.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Laurel finds a country getaway not far from the city. Kimberley discovers some secrets of inner-city suburbia. Alastair uncovers the must-do dining venues in Ipswich. We visit the popular Blackbutt Bakery.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: It's the final day of the Farmstays, as our Farmers spend time with their remaining ladies. Then, they all hit the city for a black tie dinner, where honesty leads to tension, fallouts and walkouts.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: The top four remaining stylists battle for a place in the Grand Final. Drawing on their creative animal instincts, they must transform their pooches into a wild lion, bison, monkey or bear.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: The top three stylists celebrate the grand final in true style, transforming their messy pooches for the red carpet. Who will be crowned Australia's greatest pet stylist and take home $100,000?

programme.title: Bringing Sexy Back
programme.desc: Married couple Sam and Gary were once healthy and fit. But since putting all their time into raising their kids, they have lost themselves and their health. Sam and Gary will make lasting life changes for the whole family.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Veteran house music groover Mark meets Alison - call centre worker by day, raver by night.

programme.title: Australia's Got Talent
programme.desc: A joyous performance from an all-abilities choir, an Indigenous artist presents an original, modern-day corroboree, and a world-champion rope skipper.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
programme.desc: Count Dracula and company participate in a cruise for sea-loving monsters, unaware that their boat is being commandeered by the monster-hating Van Helsing family.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Naked Singularity
programme.desc: An idealistic New York City public defender burned out by the system, on the brink of disbarment, sees signs of the universe collapsing all around him and decides to rob a $75 million drug deal of one of his clients.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: Nicky and Noah find out their dad has a new boo. Anthony and Fay look after Wyatt's plants while he's away. Sherm dates a mum. And there's wine.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Eric has a tense confrontation while looking for Liam, and later learns Kate knew that Liam was a fraud who stole investor identities. John wants to bury this information to protect the firm, but as the prime suspect, Eric does not agree. After much resistance, Eric finally agrees to be questioned by Cornell about Tina.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Eric and Danny finally track down Liam with a clue from his girlfriend, but Cornell and the police show up and take him into custody. While Eric and Danny ambush Neil at Eric's apartment, Detective Cornell arrives to break up the event.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: After Eric confronts Danny about lying, Danny explains the deal he and Cornell made when his daughter went missing. Meanwhile, Cornell interrogates Neil, and Eric and Patrick discover they have been misled.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Weekender
programme.desc: North Queensland's Townsville region is a diverse and exciting area to explore, from the rugged landscape of Hinchinbrook Island to the beauty of the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: Celebrate 80 years of racing at the Warburton Scone Horse Festival. Get out of your head & into your hands at the fun and creative Crock'd Pottery Class. Lots of adventures to be had in Coffs Harbour.

programme.title: The Food Dude
programme.desc: This episode houses a secret, to one of the best pies in Australia, we also follow your tips to a Burger place in Gippsland and take on a sausage roll at the famous Bazza's Hot Bread in Bermagui NSW.

programme.title: Malaysia Kitchen
programme.desc: Alvin dives into a Malaysian melting pot of food and flavour, sharing his recipes for a beautiful herb-scented rice dish and mouth-watering sugared coconut crepes.

programme.title: Malaysia Kitchen
programme.desc: Alvin serves up authentic rendang beef and a luscious coconut milk pudding. Malaysian food enthusiast Jackie M visits the kitchen to share her recipe for delicious Cantonese rice noodle rolls.

programme.title: A Moveable Feast
programme.desc: Melbourne's king of breakfast radio Ross Stevenson explores the Otways to find the best kept secrets, eating spots and things to do with his 3AW co-host Kate Stevenson.

programme.title: Yummy Mummies
programme.desc: The baby casting in Brisbane doesn't go to plan; Jane goes into labour, and Carlos has a big surprise for Maria.

programme.title: Instant Hotel
programme.desc: The couples arrive in the Victorian town of Mildura, on the banks of the Murray River, to stay at Bec and Tristan's Instant Hotel. The groups are surprised to discover it's not a house but a houseboat.

programme.title: Dancing with the Stars
programme.desc: Our first group of Dancing stars enter the ballroom including actor Rebecca Gibney, AFL champ Trent Cotchin, radio host Brittany Hockley, Olympians Susie O'Neill & Harry Garside & Michael Usher.
